prerequisite.closure_plan: This stage amends the contract + repairs backend/frontend; on its review-2 ACCEPT + pre-accept PASSED, the controller sets impl-v1 post_review_findings[bstocks_b_suffix_spot_margin_alias].status=resolved_by_stage (referencing this stage id + head). impl-v1 review_1/review_2 verdicts and diff_fingerprint are NOT altered.

designer.scope: Controller-direct design record (00-task.md, 10-design.md, 11-adr.md). Fable5 (anthropic) was the intended breakdown author but is unreachable this session; see breakdown_author.

breakdown_author.unavailable_reason: Local claude CLI (Claude Code 2.1.199) auth routes to zhipu_glm; --model claude-fable-5 returns error 1211 (model not found); claude.ai login overridden by configured auth source.
breakdown_author.fallback: controller-direct design (user_approved_lightweight_route, approved plan [可调整]). Fable5 has NO involvement this stage.

direction_synthesis.note: The user-approved direction synthesis (2026_07_initial_direction) and prior stages cover Phase 1 public market; the user explicitly specified the 6 amendment points. No new direction panel run this stage.

diff_fingerprint_note: Two scopes, one protocol. Filled progressively: task-level base/head/fingerprint in tasks.<id> at H_A/H_B; stage-level top-level base/head/fingerprint at H_C. status.json excluded from hash. Same formula as impl-v1; no second protocol.
commit_order_strategy: H_intake (this commit: intake/task/design/adr/handoff/status + Fable5 unavailable record) -> H_A (contract schema/doc + backend + tests) -> H_B (frontend) -> H_C (integration + stage-level fingerprint + status/handoff finalize). Controller commits serially so each task's base..head diff is owner-scoped.

rationale: Contract amendment + backend repair + frontend + tests; no new product direction (user specified the 6 amendment points).
Multi-task, so design is recorded before coding (controller-direct since Fable5 unavailable).
No new human gate: public data only, 127.0.0.1 binding, no keys, no order/borrow/repay/transfer.

A.name: Contract amendment + backend bStock alias repair

review_1.independent_test_rerun: pytest backend/tests -q -> 52 passed; grep float( clean

reviewer_1_planned.note: Fresh read-only Claude-GLM session; must not reuse the controller/Task A transcript.

excluded_for_core_work.reason: Grok stays excluded from implementation and review (per prior stages).

review_1_task_A.reason: implementer is claude_glm; cross-review selects Kimi.

review_1_task_B.reason: implementer is kimi; cross-review selects a fresh read-only Claude-GLM session (not the controller/Task A transcript).

review_2_stage.runner_level_check: Decision-model pool for review-2 = {GPT/Codex, Anthropic}. Implementers claude_glm (zhipu) and kimi wrote delivery code -> hard-banned from review-2 (no override). This stage's designer/breakdown author = controller (claude_glm), because Fable5 (anthropic) is unreachable (claude CLI auth -> zhipu_glm, error 1211 'model not found'); so Fable5 has NO involvement this stage and there is no anthropic design-involvement disclosure. direction_synthesis = codex (status=approved_prior_stage, covers this stage; no new direction panel). Codex has NO design/breakdown/code-authorship involvement this stage. Per AGENTS.md, because no provider-unrelated decision model is available (Codex=prior direction only; Fable5 unavailable; both implementers hard-banned), Codex reviews via the strong-reviewer disclosure override with reviewer_prior_involvement=direction_synthesis. Evidence: fable5-detail-breakdown.unavailable.md + this field + the disclosure section of the review-2 dispatch prompt.
review_2_stage.reason: Codex/GPT final reviewer; prior direction_synthesizer for the covering contract stage (user-approved, approved_prior_stage; no new direction panel this stage). Codex has no design/breakdown/code involvement this stage. Fable5 (the usual designer) is unavailable, so the only prior involvement is Codex's direction synthesis -> direction_synthesis override. Fallback (if Codex unavailable/invalid): decision_models_exhausted.

required_mitigation: Reviewers must recompute diff_fingerprint from base_sha and raw git diff, not controller summaries.
Test output must contain replayable raw command output.
Review prompts must pass raw artifact paths and raw diff paths, not controller paraphrases.
Task B review-1 must use a fresh read-only Claude-GLM session; the Task A controller transcript is not review evidence.
Task A amendable contract files (snapshot.schema.json + public-market-contract.md) are writable THIS stage only; contract-v2 frozen samples stay read-only historical evidence.

frozen_inputs.historical_frozen_samples: reports/api-samples/public-market-contract-v2/20260703T051738Z/** (read-only historical evidence; curated spot fixture has no bStock -> synthetic fixture used for tests)
amendable_this_stage: docs/api/public-market-contract.md (upgrade post-review note to frozen amendment)
frozen_inputs.impl_v1_prerequisite: 2026-07-public-market-impl-v1 (stage_accepted_waiting_user, head ce00489); its P1 finding bstocks_b_suffix_spot_margin_alias is closed by this stage.

hard_constraints: No API key, signed endpoint, private account endpoint, user data stream.
No order, borrow, repay, transfer, websocket.
Backend writes only backend/** + the amendable contract schema/doc + its own report.
Frontend writes only frontend/** and its own report.
classify.py logic and negative_funding_status priority must NOT change (regression-asserted only).
No collateral ratio hard-coded; margin_public.source stays unverified.
funding_history default top-N=20; do not change without explicit user change.
The formal local page must load data from the same-origin /api/public-market/snapshot.
Tests offline only; no live HTTP this stage.

review_1.scope: Task-level review-1 (Task A backend by Kimi + Task B frontend by a fresh read-only Claude-GLM Agent session). The stage-level review_1 verdict aggregates both task verdicts (both ACCEPT) and binds to the stage-level top-level diff_fingerprint, as required by scripts/validate-stage.py validate_acceptance. Per-task fingerprints live in tasks.A/tasks.B; detailed reviews are 30-review-1-backend.md and 30-review-1-frontend.md; 30-review-1.md is the stage-level summary.

next_action: Review-1 PASSED (both tasks ACCEPT, fingerprints match, schema valid); status=review_2. Next: dispatch stage-level review-2 to Codex (gpt5.5 xhigh, direction_synthesis strong-reviewer override; Fable5 unavailable; both implementers hard-banned). On review-2 ACCEPT: validate --phase pre-accept, then hold at stage_accepted_waiting_user (controller does not declare accepted; can_accept_final=false).
